data: Travel through countries, rivers, cities, landmarks, and maps.
It is strongly associated with ancient Egypt.
The Nile River flows through Cairo and has shaped Egyptian history for millennia.
Which country is both a continent and a country?
It is surrounded by the Indian and Pacific Oceans.
Australia is commonly described as both a country and a continent.
The imaginary line at 0 degrees latitude is the _____.
It divides Earth into Northern and Southern Hemispheres.
The equator is the line of 0 degrees latitude.
Which mountain range separates much of Europe from Asia?
The range runs north-south through western Russia.
The Ural Mountains are commonly used as part of the boundary between Europe and Asia.
Its major islands include Honshu, Hokkaido, Kyushu, and Shikoku.
Japan is an archipelago made up of thousands of islands.
Which desert is the largest hot desert in the world?
It stretches across much of North Africa.
The Sahara is the world's largest hot desert.
Which city is home to the Colosseum?
It was the heart of the ancient Roman Empire.
The Colosseum is in Rome, Italy.
Which country has the longest coastline in the world?
Its Arctic islands add a huge amount of shoreline.
Canada has the world's longest coastline.
The Andes are located in South America.
They run along the western edge of the continent.
The Andes are a major mountain range along South America's western side.
Which sea lies between Europe and Africa?
Ancient Greek, Roman, Egyptian, and Phoenician trade crossed it.
The Mediterranean Sea lies between southern Europe and northern Africa.
